title: Offer
description: A listing in the marketplace: a Product or Capability made available by a seller Identity at a price, sold UNDER one Operating Model and transacted over the Agent Commerce Protocol. The Offer is the ACP artifact a buyer agent discovers and turns into an Order. It is governed by listing Policy and bounded by Constraints (eligibility, price floors, rate limits).

currency.description: ISO 4217 code, e.g. USD, or a token symbol.

unit.description: Pricing unit: per-call | per-seat | per-token | per-month | flat.
